# CLKComplicationTemplateUtilitarianSmallRingText

**Class**

A template for displaying text encircled by a configurable progress ring.

## Declaration

```swift
class CLKComplicationTemplateUtilitarianSmallRingText
```

## Overview

This template belongs to the [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKComplicationFamily/utilitarianSmall] family.



## Creating the Template

- **init(textProvider:fillFraction:ringStyle:)**: Creates a new template from the provided text, fill fraction, and ring style.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **textProvider**: The text to display in the complication.
- **ringStyle**: The style of the progress ring.
- **fillFraction**: The fraction of the ring to fill.

## Utilitarian small

- **CLKComplicationTemplateUtilitarianSmallFlat**: A template for displaying an image and text in a single line.
- **CLKComplicationTemplateUtilitarianSmallRingImage**: A template for displaying an image encircled by a configurable progress ring
- **CLKComplicationTemplateUtilitarianSmallSquare**: A template for displaying a single square image.

## Inherits From

- CLKComplicationTemplate

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSCopying
- NSObjectProtocol
